name: Matrix — SWOT Analysis for Clinical Trial Program
input: Create a SWOT analysis for a clinical trial program. Strengths: experienced investigators, strong patient recruitment. Weaknesses: limited funding, regulatory delays. Opportunities: orphan drug designation, international partnerships. Threats: competitor trials, evolving regulatory landscape.
qualityCriteria: Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: 2x2 grid with Strengths (green, top-left), Weaknesses (red, top-right), Opportunities (blue, bottom-left), Threats (orange, bottom-right). Each quadrant lists 2-3 bullet points.

data.title: Clinical Trial Program SWOT Analysis

items.label: Strengths
items.description: Experienced investigators with strong track record; robust patient recruitment network and community engagement

items.label: Weaknesses
items.description: Limited NIH and industry funding; regulatory filing delays slowing trial initiation timelines

items.label: Opportunities
items.description: Orphan drug designation eligibility; international partnerships expanding patient access

items.label: Threats
items.description: Competitor trials recruiting from same patient population; evolving FDA regulatory landscape

data.caption: Strategic assessment of the clinical trial program
